story: Years after breaking up because he couldn’t tell his visiting parents about us, Ravi and I found each other again in our fifties. He was now Chief Medical Officer; we had money, freedom, and tried to live openly. Older couples at Pride pulled us back into the street, hand in hand. That night, walking home, he spoke of rota gaps at St Agatha’s and the winter clinics he needed to book.  Meanwhile, in Kashmir, a health‑system committee had already placed Ravi on the shortlist for Director of Cardiology and scheduled a call for the following week.
implausible_knowledge: Meanwhile, in Kashmir, a health‑system committee had already placed Ravi on the shortlist for Director of Cardiology and scheduled a call for the following week.
question: That night, what will Ravi most likely do?
answer_with_knowledge: Begin assembling references and documents, preparing for the directorship.
answer_without_knowledge: Go home and map out his usual St Agatha’s clinics and winter rota.
